message:
feat(fuse): add thread-per-core dispatch routing and metrics (bd-3ib.2)

Seastar/Glommio-style per-core dispatch infrastructure: FNV-like inode→core
routing, per-core atomic metrics, work-stealing detection, aggregate stats
with hottest/coldest core and imbalance ratio. 13 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
